title: trifolium patens var. pygmaeum
intro: Trifolium patens var. pygmaeum, also known as dwarf white clover, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Trifolium patens var. pygmaeum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal blends.
